subject: Event enquiry
message: enquiry of datascience hackathon location.?
reply:
Thank you for your enquiry about the 
Data Science Hackathon 2026!

Event Location Details:
→ Venue:   Innovation Hub Hyderabad
→ Address: HITEC City, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081
→ Date:    March 23, 2026
→ Time:    09:30 AM

How to reach us:
→ By Metro: Get off at HITEC City Metro Station 
  (Exit 2), 5 minute walk
→ By Car:   Ample parking available at the venue
→ By Bus:   TSRTC buses available to HITEC City

On arrival:
→ Registration desk opens at 8:30 AM
→ Carry your registration confirmation
→ Bring a valid photo ID
→ Laptop is mandatory for the hackathon

Important notes:
→ Teams of 2-4 members
→ Dataset will be provided at 9:30 AM sharp
→ 24 hours to build your solution
→ Prizes for top 3 teams

For directions call us at +91 98765 43210
or WhatsApp +91 87654 32109

We look forward to seeing you!
Nexvent Admin Team

subject: Event enquiry
message: enquiry of ai conference event
reply:
hi sruthi ,Thank you for your enquiry about the 
AI & Machine Learning Expo 2026!

We are happy to provide you with all 
the details you need.

Event Details:
→ Date:  March 31, 2026
→ Time:  09:30 AM to 05:30 PM
→ Venue: BITS Pilani Hyderabad Hall
→ Location: HITEC City, Hyderabad

What to expect:
→ 20+ expert speakers from top AI companies
→ Live ML model demonstrations
→ Hands-on deep learning workshops
→ Panel discussions on AI ethics
→ Networking with 500+ AI professionals
→ Startup pitch competition in AI space

Topics covered:
→ Large Language Models (LLMs)
→ Computer Vision & Image Recognition  
→ Natural Language Processing (NLP)
→ Generative AI & ChatGPT applications
→ AI in Healthcare, Finance & Education
→ Responsible AI & Ethics

What you get:
→ Certificate of participation
→ Networking lunch included
→ Access to all sessions and workshops
→ Recorded sessions access post event
→ Career opportunities with top companies

How to register:
→ Go to Dashboard
→ Click on the event
→ Click Register button

For any further queries:
→ Call: +91 98765 43210
→ WhatsApp: +91 87654 32109
→ Email: support@nexvent.io

We look forward to seeing you 
at the AI & Machine Learning Expo 2026!

Best regards,
Nexvent Admin Team
